name: MorphWorx
description: Generative drum sequencers, experimental synth voices, and FM percussion for VCV Rack and MetaModule.
author: MorphWorx

modules.name: Trigonomicon
modules.description: Generative drum trigger sequencer for IDM, breakbeat, amen, and drill-inspired rhythms

modules.name: SlideWyrm
modules.description: TB-303-inspired acid sequencer for pitch, gate, slide, and accent patterns

modules.name: Septagon
modules.description: 7/4 polyrhythmic drum sequencer with phase warping and per-voice density control

modules.name: Minimalith
modules.description: Compact PreenFM2-derived FM synth voice with patch loading and CV modulation

modules.name: Amenolith
modules.description: Six-instrument layered drum sampler with 10 kits, 3-layer dynamics, and multi-out plus stereo mix routing

modules.name: Phaseon1
modules.description: Performance-focused 4-operator phase modulation synth with user wavetables and formant shaping

modules.name: Xenostasis
modules.description: Self-evolving drone instrument blending wavetable motion, bytebeat noise, and internal feedback

modules.name: FerroKlast
modules.description: Eight-lane hybrid FM percussion synth for kick, dual snares, hats, ride, clap, and rim

modules.name: FerroKlast MM
modules.description: Streamlined MetaModule edition of FerroKlast with a reduced voice set

modules.name: Aetherion
modules.description: Stereo hall reverb with lo-fi tape degradation in the feedback loop
